ops.title: watch/engine.go: debounce AfterFunc not tracked by supervisor waitgroup
ops.description: Found during codex refuter review of the P1 fsnotify hardening (out of that diff's scope): watch/engine.go:67 schedules debounce callbacks via time.AfterFunc; they are not part of the supervisor wait group, so on generation reload they can run with the canceled generation's context. Traced as benign today (at most one callback against a canceled ctx, client not closed until the call exits) but deserves a reload test and possibly a tracked timer.

ops.text: a reload test exercises a pending debounce callback across a generation teardown and asserts no use of a closed client
debounce timers are either ctx-guarded or tracked so reload semantics are explicit
